zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice de Massemen於1145年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫維特倫時，她的父親Thierry Diederik van Massemen30歲，母親Mabilia van Westrem20歲。她和Gerard Wouter van Zottegem II   Rassegem Massemen Laarne至少有4個兒子和5個女兒。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice de Massemen was born in 1145, in Wetteren, East Flanders, Belgium, her father, Thierry Diederik van Massemen, was 30 and her mother, Mabilia van Westrem, was 20. She had at least 4 sons and 5 daughters with Gerard Wouter van Zottegem II   Rassegem Massemen Laarne.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice de Massemen est née en 1145, à Wetteren, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Thierry Diederik van Massemen, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mabilia van Westrem, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles avec Gerard Wouter van Zottegem II   Rassegem Massemen Laarne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice de Massemen 1145 in Wetteren, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thierry Diederik van Massemen 30 und ihre Mutter Mabilia van Westrem 20. Sie hatte mit Gerard Wouter van Zottegem II   Rassegem Massemen Laarne mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice de Massemen è nata il nel 1145 nel Wetteren, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, sua padre, Thierry Diederik van Massemen, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Mabilia van Westrem, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie con Gerard Wouter van Zottegem II   Rassegem Massemen Laarne.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Massemenが1145年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンウエッテレンで生まれた時，父Thierry Diederik van Massemenは30歳，母Mabilia van Westremは20歳であった。彼女はGerard Wouter van Zottegem II   Rassegem Massemen Laarneとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Massemen(이)가 1145년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 베테런에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thierry Diederik van Massemen(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabilia van Westrem(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Gerard Wouter van Zottegem II   Rassegem Massemen Laarne(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice de Massemen nasceu em 1145, em Wetteren, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Thierry Diederik van Massemen, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mabilia van Westrem, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas com Gerard Wouter van Zottegem II   Rassegem Massemen Laarne.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice de Massemen родилась в 1145 г. в местности веттирен, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Thierry Diederik van Massemen было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabilia van Westrem, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей от Gerard Wouter van Zottegem II   Rassegem Massemen Laarne.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrice de Massemen nació en 1145, en Wetteren, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Thierry Diederik van Massemen, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mabilia van Westrem, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas con Gerard Wouter van Zottegem II   Rassegem Massemen Laarne.
